query: Validate my Game Design Document against the GDD checklist — check the pillars, mechanics, and scope.
Help me create a GDD for my new roguelike — I want to capture pillars, the core loop, mechanics, and development epics.
Update our GDD: we changed the core mechanic and need the pillars and epics reconciled.
Analyze this existing game design document and tell me where it's weak before we move to architecture.
Create a PRD with formal functional and non-functional requirements for our game.
Just build the dash mechanic in Unity now — I don't need a design doc.
Design the game's architecture — engine systems and networking.
